rules.name: Block restricted content
rules.description: Secrets, credentials and other restricted-class detections are blocked outright.
rules.message: Restricted content (secrets/credentials) may not be sent to AI tools.

rules.name: Warn on confidential content
rules.description: Confidential-class content (PII, medical, security, government) raises a high-risk warning; connectors escalate this to a local block.
rules.message: Confidential content detected — sending this to an AI tool violates policy.

rules.name: Alert on internal content
rules.description: Internal-class content (internal memos, HR, legal, source code) requires explicit acknowledgement.
rules.message: Internal content detected — confirm before sending to an AI tool.
